air-hockey.name: Air Hockey
air-hockey.desc: High-speed competitive air hockey tables from HGR Amusement, India's leading arcade manufacturer. Features overhead LED score displays, robust industrial blowers, and custom graphic boards perfect for family entertainment centers.

products.name: Super Air hockey
products.shortDesc: Premium commercial 7ft table with digital overhead score bridge and high speed blower.
products.fullDesc: Super Air Hockey is HGR Amusement's flagship commercial model, engineered for high-traffic environments. It is built with high-quality density board, a scratch-resistant glossy laminate playing surface, and an heavy-duty blower motor. The overhead score bridge features bright LED digit displays and authentic arcade sound effects on every goal.
features: High-power silent blower motor for perfect puck float
Overhead LED scoring bridge with goal light sensors
Attract mode sound system and theme music
Adjustable game timer and credit settings

products.name: Puck Carnival Air hockey
products.shortDesc: Innovative multi-puck ticket redemption air hockey machine.
products.fullDesc: The Puck Carnival Air Hockey introduces an exciting twist to the classic game. In multi-puck mode, up to 10 pucks can be released on the table simultaneously, causing frantic and thrilling gameplay. It includes ticket dispenser modules that reward players based on the scores they achieve, driving repeat gameplay.
features: Equipped with dual ticket dispensers for redemption play
Stunning carnival themed side panel graphics
Edge-to-edge LED strip lighting with color shift

products.name: Dazzling Air Hockey – Multi Puck
products.shortDesc: Stunning premium design with multi-puck mode and high glow LED effects.
products.fullDesc: Dazzling Air Hockey is the ultimate visual draw on any gaming floor. Incorporating high-glow LED border strips and full active side illumination, this machine features HGR's signature multi-puck mode. Standard tournament width allows for competitive and high-speed multi-puck matches.
features: Active light-up neon borders synchronized with game music
Sleek modern styling with premium metallic trim
Advanced sensors to track and count multiple active pucks

products.name: Aurora Air Hockey
products.shortDesc: Glowing LED cabinet with interactive light-up playing surface.
products.fullDesc: The Aurora Air Hockey is a visually stunning table that features a complete light-up plexiglass playing deck. The puck glows under the table's custom UV and LED lights. Perfect for dark-theme gaming zones, bars, and premium FECs looking for a high-end centerpiece.
features: Glowing puck and mallet accessories included
Spectacular light show on every goal scored

products.name: Octa Air Hockey
products.shortDesc: Futuristic octagonal body structure for multi-directional angles.
products.fullDesc: Octa Air Hockey features a unique octagonal body shape that creates unconventional puck bounce patterns. Perfect for regular players seeking a fresh challenge, the geometric angles allow for tricky bank shots and extremely dynamic defense strategies.
features: Unique octagonal chassis for multi-directional bank shots
Sturdy angled iron legs for total stability
Ideal for both casual play and center floor attractions

products.name: Aero X Air Hockey
products.shortDesc: Modern frame design with double blower technology.
products.fullDesc: Aero X Air Hockey utilizes dual high-torque blower fans to provide an incredibly smooth and fast air cushion. Featuring a slimline aerodynamic frame design and digital side scoring, this table provides tournament-level speed and precision.
features: Dynamic aerodynamic profile to maximize leg space

products.name: Air Hockey Space
products.shortDesc: Futuristic space themed cabinet with cosmic neon design.
products.fullDesc: Air Hockey Space is designed with stunning cosmic themed graphics, outer-space artwork, and glowing cosmic decals. This highly interactive table is a major attraction for kids and families who love sci-fi themes.
features: Stunning space and planetary art styling
Durable corner bumpers to protect children

products.name: Fast Track Air Hockey
products.shortDesc: Rapid action scoring track designed for speed lovers.
products.fullDesc: The Fast Track Air Hockey is built for speed. Featuring a polished high-speed stainless steel playfield and a direct airflow configuration, the puck speeds are unmatched. This is the choice of elite gaming cafes and esports centers.
features: Polished stainless steel bed for maximum puck velocity
Industrial grade anodized aluminium protective rails
High speed target goals with automatic score counters
Dual coin slots with smart fake coin recognition
Reinforced structural build to prevent table shifting

products.name: Air Hockey Small Kids
products.shortDesc: Special kids-height model with cartoon styling.
products.fullDesc: Designed specifically for younger children, this model is built lower to the ground with kid-friendly mallet sizes. Colorful cartoon decals and safe rounded plastic corners make it the perfect addition to softplay zones and daycare game corners.
features: Lowered deck height for easy toddler reach
Quiet blower motor for peaceful operations
Accepts smaller tokens and custom kiddy coins

products.name: Air Hockey Lucky Hockey (Curve Top)
products.shortDesc: Curved playing surface for unpredictable puck behavior.
products.fullDesc: Lucky Hockey features a revolutionary curved playing surface that slopes upward toward the center. This creates highly dynamic and erratic puck movement, offering a unique physics challenge that turns typical air hockey matches into chaotic fun.
features: Unique curved slope design for unpredictable puck sliding

bumper-cars.name: Bumper Cars
bumper-cars.desc: Premium battery-operated bumper cars from HGR Amusement, built with commercial-grade fiberglass shells, all-round rubber safety buffers, and dual joystick driving controls.

products.name: Striking Car Batt Op.
products.shortDesc: Heavy-duty striking bumper car with high safety rubber bumper.
products.fullDesc: The Striking Car Battery Operated model is HGR Amusement's top-selling commercial bumper car. It is equipped with a high-capacity rechargeable battery pack, a robust 24V motor, and a heavy-duty inflatable rubber buffer ring that absorbs impact. Perfect for indoor FEC floors and shopping mall setups.
features: High density fiberglass shell with glossy metallic finish
Surround rubber bumper tube with excellent shock absorption
Dynamic multi-channel sound speaker with SD slot
Operator remote control emergency stop system

products.name: Battery Operated Bumper car
products.shortDesc: Standard battery-powered commercial bumper car for flexible surfaces.
products.fullDesc: This battery bumper car is built to run on various flat surfaces without requiring special steel floor grids. Made with an incredibly durable chassis, it is perfect for malls, outdoor parks, and temporary exhibition rentals. Runs up to 6 hours on a single charge.
features: Flexible operation — runs on marble, concrete, or wood
Brushless motor for quiet and low-maintenance operation
Interactive LED light wheels and body strips
Coin entry and timer display panel

products.name: Battleship Drift
products.shortDesc: Exciting battleship themed drift car with dual controller levers.
products.fullDesc: Battleship Drift Bumper Car features dual independent stick levers that control separate rear-wheel drive motors. This allows players to perform amazing 360-degree spins, sharp drifts, and realistic tank turns, offering an exciting, action-packed ride.
features: Battleship-inspired hull design with realistic details
Dual motor control for sharp drifting maneuverability
Soundboard playing thrilling engine and combat sounds

products.name: Blaze Bumper Car
products.shortDesc: Sporty racer-styled battery bumper car with lightning decals.
products.fullDesc: The Blaze Bumper Car features a sports car chassis layout, completed with aerodynamic wings and hot rod paint decals. This sleek model is highly popular among older kids and teenagers who love fast-paced competitive driving.
features: Flashing racing strip LEDs along the bumper skirt
Dual pressure sensors to detect wall impact

products.name: Drift Bumper Car
products.shortDesc: Professional grade high-drift model with slick rear wheels.
products.fullDesc: The Drift Bumper Car is engineered specifically for drifting. It uses low-friction slick wheels on the rear axle and a high-torque front wheel drive. This enables drivers to initiate controlled slides around corners, providing the ultimate arcade racing thrill.
features: Special slick rear wheels for easy drift initialization
Heavy-duty tubular steel frame for maximum safety
Multi-tone horn and engine sound emulator
Excellent battery life under drift operations

virtual-reality.name: Virtual Reality
virtual-reality.desc: Cutting-edge VR motion systems from HGR Amusement — 9D egg chairs, 360° flight platforms, multiplayer arenas, VR bikes, and full free-roam setups.

products.name: 9D VR 360 Simulator
products.shortDesc: Single-seat 9D VR pod with 360° rotation and motion effects.
products.fullDesc: Experience the ultimate solo VR adventure. The 9D VR 360 pod rotates a full 360° in sync with the virtual experience while delivering leg-tickling air effects and vibration feedback.

products.name: Double VR 360 Pod
products.shortDesc: Twin-seat 360° VR pod for couples and friends.
products.fullDesc: Two riders share a single rotating cockpit that spins 360° together. Synchronized motion platform with shared VR scenes — perfect for couples, friends, or competitive sessions.
features: Synchronized VR scenes for both seats

products.name: Egg Type VR – 1 Player
products.shortDesc: Premium egg-shaped VR chair with full sensory effects.
products.fullDesc: The iconic egg-shape VR chair delivers a premium single-player immersive experience. Features vibration feedback synced to the virtual world, leg-tickling effects, and a cool air-flow system for maximum realism.
features: Cool airflow system during action sequences

products.name: Egg Type VR – 2 Player
products.shortDesc: Double egg-shaped VR chair with shared motion platform.
products.fullDesc: The double egg VR brings the same premium experience as the single but for two players side-by-side on a shared vibration platform — ideal for families and friends.

products.name: VR 4-Seater Platform
products.shortDesc: 4-player synchronized VR experience on a motion platform.
products.fullDesc: Four players sit on a dynamic motion platform that tilts, vibrates and shakes in sync with shared VR content. Ideal for family FECs, malls, and high-traffic entertainment zones.
features: Operator PC with simple content manager

products.name: VR 6-Seater Platform
products.shortDesc: 6-player synchronized VR cinema motion platform.
products.fullDesc: The largest seated VR platform from HGR, accommodating 6 players simultaneously on a dynamic 6-DOF electric motion base. Creates massive spectator appeal and generates exceptional revenue.
features: Seats 6 players simultaneously for maximum throughput
High attract display on external screen

products.name: VR Big Space – 4 Player Arena
products.shortDesc: Free-roam VR arena with 4 players and haptic gun controllers.
products.fullDesc: Players physically walk around a 12×12ft+ arena wearing lightweight VR headsets and carrying haptic gun controllers. Up to 4 players cooperate or compete in real-time multiplayer virtual missions.
features: Haptic feedback guns for physical immersion

products.name: VR Arena Showroom
products.shortDesc: Complete showroom-grade VR arena package.
products.fullDesc: A full packaged VR arena installation with dedicated gaming PCs, anchor sensor arrays, haptic controllers, and HGR operator software. Everything needed to open a premium VR zone.
features: Turnkey installation with all hardware included

products.name: VR Car Racing Simulator
products.shortDesc: Full cockpit racing simulator with force-feedback steering.
products.fullDesc: Sit inside a real racing cockpit with bucket seat, pedals, and a force-feedback steering wheel. Paired with a VR headset for a fully immersive track racing experience at professional level.
features: Multiple race tracks and car models

products.name: GT6 Racing – 3 Screen
products.shortDesc: Triple-screen racing cockpit without VR for non-headset users.
products.fullDesc: The GT6 features a full racing cockpit with three large curved screens instead of a VR headset — ideal for players who prefer screen-based racing while still delivering a fully immersive experience.
features: No VR headset required — accessible for all ages

products.name: 3-DOF 3-Screen Racing
products.shortDesc: Motion platform racing with 3 screens and 3-DOF movement.
products.fullDesc: Combines a 3-DOF (pitch, roll, heave) motion platform with a triple-screen cockpit for one of the most realistic racing simulations available without VR. Tilts and shakes with every turn.
features: 3-DOF motion platform tilts with every corner
High dwell time and repeat play

products.name: VR Bike – Dreamland
products.shortDesc: Immersive VR motorcycle experience on a real motion bike.
products.fullDesc: Riders straddle a real motorcycle chassis that tilts left and right in sync with VR bike riding content. The Dreamland VR Bike is one of the highest earning compact VR attractions.
features: Real motorcycle tilt motion synchronized to VR

products.name: VR Bike – Oculeap
products.shortDesc: Advanced VR bike with full body motion platform.
products.fullDesc: The Oculeap VR Bike takes motorcycle simulation further with a full-body motion platform that pitches forward and backward as well as leaning side to side for ultra-realistic riding physics.
features: Full-axis body motion platform (pitch, lean, heave)

products.name: UFO VR – 5 Player (Dreamland)
products.shortDesc: Iconic UFO-shaped rotating VR platform for 5 players.
products.fullDesc: The UFO VR is an unmissable centerpiece attraction. Five players sit in a circular UFO structure that rotates as a group while experiencing synchronized VR content — an extraordinary visual draw.
features: Iconic UFO-shape design — instant visual magnet
5 players share a rotating group experience
Synchronized VR content for all seats

products.name: VR Shooting Game
products.shortDesc: Standing VR shooting game with real gun props.
products.fullDesc: A compact standing VR shooting station where players hold a real prop gun with vibration feedback to shoot targets in an immersive virtual battle environment.
features: Realistic prop gun with haptic vibration
Multiple battle and zombie game modes
Great for corridors and small zones

products.name: VR Gatling Gun
products.shortDesc: Gatling-style multi-barrel gun VR shooting experience.
products.fullDesc: Players operate a heavy Gatling-style multi-barrel gun prop while battling waves of enemies in VR. The weight and rotation of the gun barrel makes the experience uniquely physical.

products.name: VR Space Wheel
products.shortDesc: Rotating space-wheel VR experience with 360° spin.
products.fullDesc: Riders sit on a large spinning wheel structure that rotates in multiple axes while experiencing zero-gravity space simulation VR. One of the most thrilling group VR attractions available.
features: Major visual anchor for any floor

products.name: VR Cricket Simulator
products.shortDesc: VR cricket batting experience with real bat prop.
products.fullDesc: Step up to the crease in virtual reality. Players hold a real bat prop and face live bowling simulations including fast bowlers, spinners, and fielding challenges — ideal for the Indian market.
features: Real bat prop with embedded sensor
Multiple bowling styles and difficulty levels

products.name: VR World Simulator
products.shortDesc: Seated VR world exploration pod with wide content library.
products.fullDesc: A comfortable seated VR exploration pod offering access to a massive content library of world landmarks, underwater dives, aerial flights, and adventure scenes — suitable for all ages.
features: Comfortable padded seat for all ages

trampoline-park.name: Trampoline Park
trampoline-park.desc: Professional trampoline park layouts, designs, and hardware from Indian Game Factory — featuring CE and ASTM certified structural steel grids, high-density foam pits, wall-running zones, and commercial-grade safety padding for full-turnkey entertainment setups.

products.name: Starter Trampoline Park (2000–4000 sq.ft)
products.shortDesc: Starter turnkey park design including jump beds, safety padding, and foam pits.
products.fullDesc: The Starter Trampoline Park package is optimized for entrepreneurs entering the active amusement space. This turnkey solution includes custom 3D layout planning, high-strength structural steel frame grids, commercial spring beds, a large safety foam pit with flame-retardant cubes, and comprehensive on-site installation by IGF engineers.
features: Galvanized steel pipe structural grids for high tensile load capacity
Heavy-duty 50mm safety padding over all frame edges and walls
High-density foam pit with certified fire-retardant foam cubes
Custom 3D layout design adapted to your ceiling height and floor plan
Spring beds tested to 400kg+ repeated load cycles
Complete operator safety training and manual included

products.name: Pro Trampoline Park (4000–8000 sq.ft)
products.shortDesc: Mid-tier professional park with wall runs, dodgeball zone, and multi-jump courts.
products.fullDesc: The Pro Trampoline Park scales up the experience with dedicated dodgeball arenas, foam-padded wall-run lanes, slam-dunk zones, and interconnected multi-level jump courts. Ideal for mid-size family entertainment centers and standalone trampoline parks targeting the teen and young-adult audience.

specs.label: Zones Included
specs.val: Jump + Dodgeball + Wall Run + Foam Pit

features: Dedicated dodgeball arena with high-strength safety netting
Foam-padded wall-running lanes with angled ramp approach
Multiple interconnected jump courts at different heights
Slam-dunk zone with padded low-height basketball hoops
Digital capacity management system for safety compliance
Perimeter CCTV-ready steel framing with cable management

products.name: Elite Trampoline Park (8000+ sq.ft)
products.shortDesc: Full-scale elite park with ninja warrior course, VR jump zone & climbing walls.
products.fullDesc: The Elite Trampoline Park is a complete large-format active entertainment destination. It layers trampoline jumping with a Ninja Warrior obstacle circuit, a VR integration zone, rock-climbing walls, and a dedicated performance-stage jump area. Perfect for standalone parks, large FECs, and resort entertainment.

specs.label: Zones Included
specs.val: Jump + Ninja + Foam + Climb + VR Zone

features: Ninja Warrior obstacle course with interchangeable challenge segments
VR integration zone with overhead harness tracks
Rock-climbing wall section with auto-belay safety systems
Performance jump stage with lighting and speaker system
Dedicated birthday/party room with viewing window
Full park management software and ticket/wristband system included

products.name: Kids Trampoline Zone (800–2000 sq.ft)
products.shortDesc: Compact colorful trampoline zone specifically designed for children under 12.
products.fullDesc: The Kids Trampoline Zone is designed for younger children with lower jump heights, ultra-soft PVC padding, bright cartoon-themed artwork, and age-appropriate obstacle elements. Perfect as an add-on section within a larger FEC, mall play area, or indoor playground to serve the 2–12 age group safely.
features: Low-height spring beds specially calibrated for lighter child weight
Extra-thick 80mm ultra-soft safety padding on all surfaces
Bright cartoon character themed wall art and structural panels
Dedicated toddler zone (under 3 years) with foam-only play area
Enclosed perimeter with adult supervision view windows
Slip-resistant grip socks included in entry pricing

basketball-machines.name: Basketball Machines
basketball-machines.desc: High-earning redemption basketball hoops from HGR Amusement, featuring motorized moving hoops, smart steel frames, ticket dispensers, and multiplayer link capability.

products.name: Crazy Basket ball
products.shortDesc: Classic redemption basketball arcade with moving hoop option.
products.fullDesc: Crazy Basketball is the ultimate arcade standard. In later stages of the game, the basketball hoop begins to move horizontally left and right, testing players' precision. Equipped with bright LED backboard displays, ticket payout mechanisms, and rugged steel netting.
features: Motorized left-to-right moving basket in advanced stages
Supports linkage of up to 16 units for tournament play

products.name: NBA Basketball
products.shortDesc: Premium basketball arcade with professional championship themes.
products.fullDesc: Featuring a high-end metal frame and stadium-grade backboard glass, the NBA Basketball simulator brings the professional arena experience to the game room. Excellent audio system plays commentary, cheers, and theme music during high-score streaks.
features: Championship buzzer and commentators sound effects
High precision optical infrared score counters
Foldable front tray for easy shipping and assembly
Sturdy solid iron ball return slide

products.name: Basket Ball Show Time
products.shortDesc: High interactive model with digital display screen scoreboard.
products.fullDesc: Basketball Show Time replaces the traditional backboard with a large interactive digital LCD display. The screen displays high-definition game graphics, animated score announcements, and a player leaderboard, creating a hybrid arcade-sports experience.
features: Multiple unique mini-games built into the software
Animated characters cheering on player hits
Configurable payout: tickets, tokens, or cards

products.name: Basket ball Supreme
products.shortDesc: Solid steel construction built for heavy commercial use.
products.fullDesc: Basketball Supreme is built like a tank. Featuring a thick steel frame, scratch-resistant steel powder-coating, and high-impact mesh barriers, it is engineered to withstand aggressive playing styles in heavy-footfall zones and major commercial malls.
features: Industrial structural steel build designed to endure high impact
Anti-rust coating suited for outdoor FEC environments
Extra-bright LED display showing score and time remaining
Equipped with industrial electronic coin coin-mech

products.name: Super MVP4 Basketball
products.shortDesc: Four-player linkage standard for multi-player matches.
products.fullDesc: Super MVP4 is optimized for multiplayer tournaments. Standard hardware configuration includes out-of-the-box support for 4-player linkage. Players compete synchronously on a linked leaderboard, making it a major attraction for groups.
features: Stunning top marquee header board connecting all 4 units

bowling-alley.name: Bowling Alley
bowling-alley.desc: Commercial bowling alley equipment from HGR Amusement, featuring professional synthetic lanes, high-speed string pinsetters, and cosmic LED lighting solutions.

products.name: Professional Synthetic Bowling Alley
products.shortDesc: Premium commercial synthetic bowling lanes with automatic score panels.
products.fullDesc: Our Professional Bowling Alley packages are built using high-strength synthetic lane laminate boards that require no oil maintenance. Features automated high-speed string pinsetter machines, overhead digital scoring screens, cosmic UV neon lanes, and electronic bumper systems for kiddy plays.
features: Ultra-hard synthetic lane boards (zero wood polishing)
Cosmic UV lighting package with glow-in-the-dark effects
Overhead LCD display showing animated score summaries
Automated electronic bumper guides for kids

kiddy-rides.name: Kiddy Rides
kiddy-rides.desc: Colorful and high-engagement kiddy rides from HGR Amusement, featuring high-gloss fiberglass bodies, music chips, and adjustable rocking timers.

products.name: Rotational Carousel Ride
products.shortDesc: Luxury rotating kiddy carousel with glowing lighting.
products.fullDesc: A gorgeous multi-seat kiddy carousel featuring beautifully crafted fiberglass horses and carriage seats. The carousel rotates smoothly while the horses slide vertically up and down, accompanied by magical carousel melodies and glowing warm-color LED bulbs.
features: Warm retro cabochon bulb lighting sets
Vertical slide motion and smooth rotation gear
Built-in MP3 sound chip with SD card slot
Adjustable ride timers and volume dials

products.name: Mini Track Train Ride
products.shortDesc: Coin-operated miniature train set on modular track loop.
products.fullDesc: The Mini Track Train Ride consists of an electric locomotive and 3 passenger carriages riding on a modular track system. Perfect for central mall floors and outdoor theme zones, it can seat up to 12 children per trip with complete perimeter safety.
features: Locomotive with smoke effects and steam whistle audio
Safe low-voltage power supply track grids
Secure child safety bars on each carriage seat

shooting-games.name: Shooting Games
shooting-games.desc: Exciting video shooting and laser target games from HGR Amusement, featuring force-feedback realistic guns and high-definition visual boards.

products.name: Laser Target Shooting Gallery
products.shortDesc: Multiplayer laser gun gallery with reactive moving targets.
products.fullDesc: Laser Target Shooting Gallery features a beautifully detailed mechanical backdrop representing a wild-west or alien landscape. Up to 4 players can shoot reactive targets simultaneously using safe infrared laser guns. Points are computed in real-time, dispensing redemption tickets.
features: Mechanical moving targets that drop or rotate when hit
Laser guns with realistic force-feedback recoil motors

gift-redemption.name: Gift Redemption
gift-redemption.desc: High-earning crane crawlers and prize dispensers from HGR Amusement, featuring highly precise claw controllers, glowing prize display shelves, and POS integration.

products.name: Redemption Counter Prize Management
products.shortDesc: Full commercial redemption display counter with software POS.
products.fullDesc: This is the complete package to set up a professional redemption prize station. Includes modular illuminated display cabinets, glass prize cases, and HGR's proprietary cloud-based POS software for scanning paper/electronic tickets, managing stock inventory, and logging prize trades.
features: Sleek modern display counter with glass shelving
Integrated cloud management software for prize stocks
High speed barcode scanner to read player tickets
Under-shelf LED illumination to show off premium prizes

strength-based-games.name: Strength-Based Games
strength-based-games.desc: Crowd-pulling boxing machines and mallet towers from HGR Amusement, featuring high-accuracy digital pressure sensors and dynamic LED displays.

products.name: Muscular Power High Striker
products.shortDesc: Modern electronic test-of-strength high striker tower.
products.fullDesc: The Muscular Power High Striker is the ultimate arcade centerpiece. Players swing a padded rubber mallet onto a high-performance spring sensor. The tower's dynamic LED stack illuminates vertically based on impact force, culminating in a triumphant buzzer and bell sound on maximum strikes.
features: Massive 15 ft tall light-up score tower
Padded rubber mallet with reinforced safety handle
Dynamic voice announcer taunting or cheering players
Accepts coin, token, and RFID card readers

inflatables.name: Inflatables
inflatables.desc: Heavy-duty commercial inflatable parks and bounce structures from HGR Amusement, crafted from double-stitched 0.55mm PVC tarpaulin with CE certification.

products.name: Mega Inflatable Obstacle Course
products.shortDesc: 15-meter double-stitched commercial PVC obstacle crawl course.
products.fullDesc: A colossal 15-meter long inflatable obstacle course designed for FEC play rooms, outdoor lawns, and mall events. Players squeeze through tunnels, climb synthetic rock grips, dodge hanging pillars, and slides down a 3.5-meter slope. Made from industrial-grade 0.55mm Plato PVC.

specs.label: Dimensions
specs.val: 50 x 12 x 15 ft (L x W x H)

features: Reinforced quadruple stitches on high-tension corners
Includes dual heavy-duty continuous air blower pumps
Meets international EN14960 safety standard guidelines

battery-operated-rides.name: Battery Operated Rides
battery-operated-rides.desc: Highly popular battery-powered bumper karts, animal crawlers, and character jeeps from HGR Amusement, featuring parent override remote control packs.

products.name: Kids Electric Jeep Ride
products.shortDesc: Premium 4x4 kids electric jeep with parent remote and music player.
products.fullDesc: A gorgeous scaled replica of an off-road 4x4 jeep, built with safe fiberglass and high durability plastic parts. Children can drive it themselves with a steering wheel and pedal, while parents can override control via a 2.4GHz remote controller. Equipped with LED headlights, realistic exhaust pipes, and a sound box.
features: Detailed off-road scaling with realistic exhaust pipes
Digital dashboard display showing battery percentage
Built-in audio player with USB, SD, and Bluetooth input
Spring shock suspension system for smooth mall rides
Smart automatic emergency brakes on pedal release

products.name: Battery Operated Chameleon
products.shortDesc: Adorable color-changing chameleon ride for toddlers.
products.fullDesc: The Chameleon Ride is an enchanting kiddy ride designed with multiple light-up chameleon skins that softly shift colors. It is built using top-grade fiberglass and includes child-friendly speed thresholds and seatbelts.

products.name: Battery Operated Crawler Excavator
products.shortDesc: Highly realistic battery crawler excavator with working sand bucket.
products.fullDesc: Let kids feel like real construction operators! This model features a fully controllable mechanical digging arm and bucket. Operates on continuous rubber crawler tracks that can traverse mall tiles, concrete paths, and lawns smoothly.
features: Robust crawler tracks for excellent traction

products.name: Battery Operated Excavator
products.shortDesc: Stationary sand and ball digger ride with rotating base.
products.fullDesc: A fantastic interactive coin-timer attraction that allows children to operate a fully mechanical excavator arm. Ideal for indoor sandboxes, ball pits, and active play zones.
features: Supports sand, gravel, and play-ball picking
Sturdy steel safety barrier around base

products.name: Battery Operated F1 Car
products.shortDesc: Sleek scaled Formula 1 racing kart with digital speedometer.
products.fullDesc: Bring racing thrill to kids! Equipped with low-profile tires, a formula-style steering wheel, dynamic racing sound effects, and customizable speed levels.

products.name: Battery Operated Helicopter
products.shortDesc: Sky-themed kids ride with rotating propeller blades.
products.fullDesc: This helicopter ride features rotating overhead rotors (fitted with soft foam edge bumpers for safety) and flight instrument lights, offering kids a fantastic air pilot experience.
products: Cockpit steering wheel and joystick triggers

products.name: Battery Operated Mirage Chariot Bike
products.shortDesc: Exquisite chariot bike with stunning LED borders.
products.fullDesc: The Mirage Chariot Bike combines standard bike riding with a futuristic chariot base, detailed with neon LED strip linings. It features excellent stability and runs perfectly on all flat commercial floors.
features: High gloss premium metallic paint finishes

products.name: Battery Operated Motorcycle
products.shortDesc: Cruiser style kids motorcycle with rubber tires.
products.fullDesc: A gorgeous scaled replica of a cruiser bike, built with real rubber air tires and high stability training wheels. Offers an authentic motorcycle riding experience for kids.
features: Soft leather seats for maximum comfort

products.name: Battery Operated Panda
products.shortDesc: Cute furry panda animal rider with plush upholstery.
products.fullDesc: The Panda animal rider is an absolute mall favorite. It is covered in soft, high-quality plush fabric, and children drive it using a handle bar at a safe and gentle speed.
features: Soft walking speeds safe for indoor mall crowds
Surround light-up cheeks and body LEDs

products.name: Battery Operated Phantom God
products.shortDesc: Futuristic sci-fi mech robot ride with interactive lasers.
products.fullDesc: Step inside a sci-fi mech! The Phantom God Robot allows kids to sit inside a detailed robot cockpit, controlling steering and light-up laser blasters.
features: Interactive sound effects with laser firing triggers

products.name: Battery Operated Police Bike
products.shortDesc: Police themed patrol bike with working sirens.
products.fullDesc: Let children patrol the FEC floor! Featuring authentic police decal wraps, flashing blue-red warning sirens, and a storage trunk behind the rider.
features: Vibrant cop siren horns and lights
Spacious rear toy box storage compartment

products.name: Battery Operated Royal Deer Carriage
products.shortDesc: Magical fairytale deer carriage for prince and princess plays.
products.fullDesc: A gorgeous fairytale carriage pulled by a beautifully sculpted gold-horned deer. This premium attraction seats up to two children and glows under hundreds of LED bulbs.
features: Double bench seats with safety harness belts
Hundreds of glowing LED warm lights

products.name: Battery Operated Sea Horse
products.shortDesc: Ocean themed kiddy ride with gentle rocking.
products.fullDesc: A cute oceanic sea horse rider detailed with beautiful pastel scales and aquatic side fins. Rocks gently back and forth while driving forward.
features: Ocean sea horse shape molded from fiberglass
Soft eccentric rocking motion on flat floors
Vibrant light-up side fins and tail

products.name: Battery Operated Sport Smily Car
products.shortDesc: Cheerful smily face bumper car ride for toddlers.
products.fullDesc: Features a cheerful smiling front face styling and rubber outer bumper tube, providing safe and delightful bumper play for very young children.
features: Shock absorbing outer PVC bumper ring
Fun interactive sound keys and musical horns

products.name: Battery Operated Sports Car
products.shortDesc: Premium sports car scale model with scissor doors.
products.fullDesc: A high-end sports car replica with vertical scissor doors, authentic sports car grill styling, chrome-accented rims, and a luxury leather interior.

products.name: Battery Operated Tank
products.shortDesc: Military themed mini tank ride with firing sounds.
products.fullDesc: Let children command their own military vehicle! Featuring camouflage decals, a rotatable top turret, and interactive sound effects for canon fire.
features: Top mechanical turret with firing sounds

products.name: Battery Operated Train
products.shortDesc: Trackless train engine ride with authentic whistle sounds.
products.fullDesc: This battery operated trackless train locomotive is designed for indoor malls. It has classic train smoke stack visuals, colorful LED details, and real train audio whistles.
features: Authentic steam engine whistle sound boards
Vivid LED lighting outlining carriage lines
